name: NPD Item
description: A Product or a Service that is bought, sold or kept in stock.

fields.label: Variant Of
fields.description: If item is a variant of another item then description, image, pricing, taxes etc will be set from the template unless explicitly specified

fields.label: Default Material Request Type
fields.options:
Purchase
Material Transfer
Material Issue
Manufacture
Customer Provided

fields.label: Weight Per Unit
fields.description: Item Weight

fields.label: Weight UOM
fields.description: Item Weight UOM

fields.label: Barcode
fields.description: Barcode for the item (ie: EAN-13).

fields.label: Pack Barcode
fields.description: The barcode for the identification of distribution boxes or pallets containing products (ie: EAN-14).

fields.label: Item Height
fields.description: Height of item in cm.

fields.label: Item Width
fields.description: Width of item in cm.

fields.label: Item Depth
fields.description: Depth of item in cm.

fields.label: Pack Count
fields.description: Quantity of item pieces contained in the pack.

fields.label: Pack Height
fields.description: Height of pack in cm.

fields.label: Pack Width
fields.description: Width of pack in cm.

fields.label: Pack Depth
fields.description: Depth of pack in cm.

fields.label: Pack Weight
fields.description: in kg

fields.label: Pallet packs per layer
fields.description: Quantity of packs per layer on pallet.

fields.label: Pallet layers
fields.description: Quantity of layers on pallet.

fields.label: Packs per pallet
fields.description: Quantity of packs on pallet.

fields.label: Pallet weight
fields.description: Weight of pallet in weight UOM.

fields.label: Pallet height
fields.description: Height of pallet in cm.

fields.label: Pallet width
fields.description: Width of pallet in cm.

fields.label: Pallet depth
fields.description: Depth of pallet in cm.
Parámetro de porcentaje para análisis de diferencias en Stock Entries. Default a 3%

fields.label: Porcentaje de Diferencia permitida en Stock Entries
fields.description: Parámetro de porcentaje para análisis de diferencias en Stock Entries

fields.label: Reorder level based on Warehouse
fields.description: Will also apply for variants unless overrridden

fields.label: UOMs
fields.description: Will also apply for variants

fields.label: Batch Number Series
fields.description: Example: ABCD.#####. If series is set and Batch No is not mentioned in transactions, then automatic batch number will be created based on this series. If you always want to explicitly mention Batch No for this item, leave this blank. Note: this setting will take priority over the Naming Series Prefix in Stock Settings.

fields.label: Max Sample Quantity
fields.description: Maximum sample quantity that can be retained

fields.label: Serial Number Series
fields.description:
Example: ABCD.#####
If series is set and Serial No is not mentioned in transactions, then automatic serial number will be created based on this series. If you always want to explicitly mention Serial Nos for this item. leave this blank.

fields.label: Has Variants
fields.description: If this item has variants, then it cannot be selected in sales orders etc.

fields.label: Minimum Order Qty
fields.description: Minimum quantity should be as per Stock UOM

fields.label: Lead Time in days
fields.description: Average time taken by the supplier to deliver

fields.label: Reading required
fields.description: If the item requires Gas or Electricity or similar meter reading to charge the customer.

fields.label: Taxes
fields.description: Will also apply for variants

fields.label: Supply Raw Materials for Purchase
fields.description: If subcontracted to a vendor

fields.label: Contenido energetico kcal
fields.description: Por porción.

fields.label: Contenido energetico kJ
fields.description: Por porción.

fields.label: Contenido energetico por envase kcal
fields.description: Por envase.

fields.label: Contenido energetico por envase kJ
fields.description: Por envase.

fields.label: Contenido neto
fields.description: Indica el contenido neto con los decimales y unidades de medida adecuados para la etiqueta.

fields.label: Exceso Energia
fields.description: ≥ 70 kcal totales o ≥ 8 kcal de azúcares libres

fields.label: Exceso Azucares
fields.description:
≥ 10 % del total de energía proveniente e
azúcares libres.

fields.label: Exceso Grasas Saturadas
fields.description:
≥ 1 % del total de energía proveniente
de grasas trans.

fields.label: Exceso Sodio
fields.description: ≥ 1 mg de sodio por kcal o ≥ 300 mg

fields.label: Publish in Hub
fields.description: Publish Item to hub.erpnext.com

fields.label: Hub Warehouse
fields.description: Publish "In Stock" or "Not in Stock" on Hub based on stock available in this warehouse.

fields.label: Tasa de Impuesto
fields.description: Utilice numeros enteros. Ej. 16 para una tasa del 16%. 8 para tasa de 8%.

fields.label: UPC
fields.description: Código numérico único que identifica al producto (sin ceros ni dígito verificador) ejemplo: 73502931190

fields.label: Descripción comercial del producto
fields.description: Indicar las características detalladas del producto
